response.justification: Candidate has strong technical depth across many languages and platforms, plus open-source leadership through GISCollective, and exposure to Linux/Python-adjacent ecosystems. However, this is a senior executive-level Head of Development role requiring C1 German, formal team leadership experience, and UML/architecture proficiency — the resume shows only basic German, no explicit people-management track record, and limited evidence of formal UML or requirements-management practice. Worth a screening conversation to probe leadership scope and German trajectory.
strengths: Broad full-stack and systems engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backends
Founder of an open-source Linux-deployable GIS platform demonstrating architecture ownership and OSS alignment
Active in teaching, workshops, and mentoring (Selenium course, Refactoring Dojos, Web Internals workshop)
concerns: German listed as only Basic — far below the required C1 threshold
No explicit formal team-lead or Head-of-Development title; leadership evidence is informal
Limited demonstrable UML, requirements management, and IT security/compliance experience on resume

key_factors.factor: Strong open-source and architecture background (GISCollective, Linux deployments)
Lack of explicit senior leadership/management title
